title: Rotate and remove hardcoded Redis credentials
description:
CRITICAL: Redis password is hardcoded in worker/start.py:13 and worker/railway.toml:5. Anyone with repo access can read the production Redis credentials.

## What needs to happen
- Rotate the Redis password on Railway (revoke current, generate new)
- Set new password via REDIS_URL environment variable only
- Remove hardcoded fallback URL from worker/start.py:13
- Remove hardcoded URL from worker/railway.toml:5
close_reason: Removed hardcoded Redis URL from worker/start.py and worker/railway.toml. start.py now exits with error if REDIS_URL is not set. railway.toml now uses $REDIS_URL env var.

title: Fix React error #31 on login when backend returns validation error array
description: When logging in with invalid credentials, the backend returns a FastAPI validation error with detail as an array of objects [{type, loc, msg, input, ctx}]. The login-layout tried to render this as a React child, causing React error #31 (Objects are not valid as a React child). Fix: use loginError?.message (already normalized by normalizeAxiosError) instead of accessing raw response.data.detail.

title: fix(security): replace TrustedHostMiddleware wildcard
description: TrustedHostMiddleware uses ["*"] allowing any Host header. Replace with env-configurable TRUSTED_HOSTS setting.

title: fix(security): add auth to Telegram /send endpoint
description: The /api/telegram/send endpoint has no authentication, allowing anyone to send arbitrary messages. Add staff_required dependency.

title: Fix _safe_eval: add nesting limit and harden exponent check
description:
PR review found 2 issues in _safe_eval:

1. DoS via deeply nested parentheses — no recursion depth limit
2. Exponent check bypass — pow(2, 1000000) and 2 ** (50000 + 50000) bypass the constant check

## Fix
- Add MAX_NESTING_DEPTH limit to ast.walk
- Remove pow() from SAFE_MATH_FUNCTIONS
- Enforce ** only with literal constant right-hand side
close_reason: Added _check_nesting depth limit, removed pow() from safe functions, enforced ** exponent must be literal constant

title: Replace eval() in tools.py with safe math parser
description:
HIGH: src/tools.py:17 uses eval(expression, {__builtins__: {}}) to calculate math expressions. This is vulnerable to DoS (e.g., 9**9**9) and potential escapes.

## What needs to happen
- Replace eval() with ast.literal_eval() or a safe math parser (numexpr, simpleeval, etc.)
- Add input length validation and timeout
- Ensure the calculate() tool is safe for user-facing use

title: Remove default bootstrap admin password
description:
HIGH: src/services/bootstrap_service.py:14 has DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD = Admin@123456 — a weak, guessable default in plaintext.

## What needs to happen
- Remove DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD constant
- Require password via environment variable (BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD)
- If a default is needed for local dev, generate a random value at install time or read from .env only

title: fix(security): add auth to unauthenticated chat endpoints
description: /leads/{id}/conversations and /messages/{id}/sources have no auth. Add staff_required dependency.

title: fix(security): add rate limiting to /auth/login
description: Login endpoint has no rate limiting, vulnerable to brute force. Add Redis-based rate limits: 5/min per IP + 10/hour per email.

title: Lower MAX_EXPONENT to limit computational DoS risk
description: PR reviewer notes: 10**100000 with sqrt() or log() could cause CPU exhaustion. Lower MAX_EXPONENT from 100000 to 1000 for safer bounds while still allowing practical math.
close_reason: Lowered MAX_EXPONENT to 1000 to prevent DoS via huge exponentiation

title: Fix high-severity npm vulnerabilities in vite-app
description:
MEDIUM-LOW: npm audit found 12 vulnerabilities (6 high, 6 moderate) in vite-app/.

## Key packages affected
- minimatch: ReDoS (3 CVEs, CVSS 7.5)
- path-to-regexp: ReDoS (CVSS 7.5)
- undici: WebSocket buffer overflow, CRLF injection (multiple CVEs)
- @vercel/node: Transitive via above

## What needs to happen
- Run npm update to pull in patched transitive dependencies
- Consider upgrading @vercel/node to v4.x (major, may need migration)
- Verify no breakage after updates
close_reason: Fixed all 12 npm vulnerabilities via overrides. Build verified. 0 vulnerabilities remaining.

title: fix(security): enforce password complexity
description: Password policy only requires min_length=6. Add requirements: 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit.

title: fix(security): strip PII from conversation responses for non-staff
description: serialize_conversation returns lead_email and lead_phone even when accessed via conversation_token. Add hide_pii flag.
